concepts.title: Smooth manifolds and atlases
concepts.blurb: Smooth manifolds glue Euclidean charts by smooth transition maps.

concepts.title: Tangent spaces and bundles
concepts.blurb: Tangent vectors form bundles supporting differential equations and geometry.

concepts.title: Immersions, submersions, and submanifolds
concepts.blurb: Rank conditions control local models for embedded and immersed manifolds.
